scores.notes: Text accuracy is fair for company name and address, but has several character substitutions and missing spaces. Table structure is not applicable as the ground truth is a flat JSON, but the OCR output does not present any structured data in a table format. Numeric precision is good for the date and total, with only a minor discrepancy in the total. Layout preservation is poor as the OCR output is a block of text with some line breaks, not reflecting the structured nature of the ground truth. Completeness is decent, capturing most of the required information, but with some errors.
